full_text:
Gongsun Fang 公孫方
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Fang (公孫方). Studied under Zheng Xuan with his friend Cui Yan. He died young. Gongsun Fang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
